rows.source_raw: Azgalist - Whenever you take damage, move one step forward on a secret three step counter. On step one, a 'thesis' d20 die is thrown. rows.source_raw: Azgalist - Whenever you take damage, move one step forward on a secret three step counter. On step one, a 'thesis' d20 die is thrown. On step two, if the damage you took is higher than the 'thesis' die, an 'antithesis' d4 die is thrown. On step three, the damage you took is lowered either by 1, or by the 'antithesis' die if that die was rolled during step two. This is 'synthesis', somehow. The next time you take damage, return to step one.

The next time you take damage, return to step one.
